SustainabilityStats.title: Growing a Greener Tomorrow
SustainabilityStats.desc: We're more than a marketplace. We're a precision agriculture platform connecting you directly to the source, reducing carbon footprints and ensuring fair pay for those who feed us.

Newsletter.title: Stay Updated with GreenMart
Newsletter.desc: Get weekly recipes, farmer stories, and exclusive discounts delivered to your inbox.
Newsletter.privacy_note: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.

About.meta_description: Learn more about GreenMart, our mission to support local farmers, and our sustainable agricultural marketplace.
About.hero_title: Connecting Your Kitchen to Local Farmers
About.hero_subtitle: GreenMart is a precision agriculture platform committed to shortening the food supply chain, empowering local growers, and delivering fresh organic produce to your doorstep within 24 hours.
About.vision_desc: To create a sustainable food ecosystem where farmers receive fair compensation and consumers access the freshest, highest-quality produce.
About.mission_desc: Empowering local farming communities through precision agricultural technology, supply chain transparency, and eco-friendly logistics to nurture a greener tomorrow.
About.value1_desc: Every single harvest is inspected and certified to ensure it meets the highest standards of organic and fresh quality.
About.value2_desc: We eliminate unnecessary middlemen to ensure farmers earn more while consumers get the best value for their purchase.
About.value3_desc: From biodegradable packaging to optimized delivery routes, we actively reduce carbon emissions in every step.
About.value4_desc: We support 2,000+ local families by providing data insights, advanced farming tools, and fair market access.
About.how_subtitle: Bridging the gap from fertile soil directly to your dining table.
About.step1_desc: Verified local farmers harvest mature organic produce at peak ripeness.
About.step2_desc: Produce is cleaned, sorted, and packed in minimal, eco-friendly materials.
About.step3_desc: Logistical optimization delivers the harvest to your kitchen within 24 hours.
About.cta_title: Ready to experience the freshest harvest?
About.cta_subtitle: Start supporting local farmers and enjoy healthy, organic produce today.
